title: Docplexus Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Docplexus Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Docplexus Digital Technologies family as a Full Stack Developer in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Docplexus Digital Technologies:
Docplexus Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus Digital Technologies!
